query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: A frame filled with warm-toned gradients ranging from deep black through crimson to bright orange and yellow at the upper edge, with softly diffused transitions between color zones and faint patterned textures visible within the colored fields.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An abstract image of warm-toned color gradients from deep black through crimson to bright orange and yellow, where all detail has dissolved into soft, blurry color fields with no discernible subject, form, or structure—surfaces and features rendered as smeared, indistinct masses of hue.
